description: Evidence about the existence, beta, and structure of Beltrami / double-Beltrami equilibria that admit the H3 quartic Alfven minimum.

open_questions.question: The field appears to agree about Beltrami / double-Beltrami equilibrium constructions. What experiment or derivation would actually change this consensus?

suggested_next_steps.description: Identify a measurement that, if it landed at a value contrary to the current consensus, would force a rewrite within the group.
suggested_next_steps.title: Counter-experiment proposal

title: Beltrami / double-Beltrami equilibrium constructions
